utterances.speaker: Chandler

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I mean it is bad enough that I am in love with my roommates girlfriend ... which by the way , I think she knows .

emotion_cause.span: 5_every time we are in the room together there is this weird like energy between us .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: And call me crazy , but I think she likes me too .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: And now I have seen her naked .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I mean at least when I have seen her with clothes on , I could imagine her body was like covered in boles or something .
